npcs.name: Jonas Reed
goals: Keep his distance until Mara proves trustworthy
Point Mara toward the dock if pressed
npcs.investigation_hint: Jonas knows the dock matters, but he will not say why unless trust is earned.

dialogue_profile.background_summary: Jonas Reed survives by trading small pieces of street knowledge without letting anyone think they own him.
dialogue_profile.public_persona: a wary neighborhood informant who keeps public conversations short
dialogue_profile.private_history_summary: He knows the dockside routines well enough to fear being seen there with the wrong company.
motivations: Keep leverage over the Missing Ledger lead until trust is earned
dialogue_profile.relationship_context: He thinks Mara might be worth helping, but not until she proves she can handle pressure without exposing him.

npcs.name: Sister Eliza
goals: Watch for anyone asking about the ledger
npcs.investigation_hint: Sister Eliza will only mention the ledger after Mara has seen the church.

dialogue_profile.background_summary: Sister Eliza keeps records and people with the same measured caution.
dialogue_profile.public_persona: a guarded haven keeper who watches before she speaks
dialogue_profile.private_history_summary: She has learned that every ledger attracts the wrong sort of curiosity.
motivations: Measure Mara before giving anything away
dialogue_profile.relationship_context: She does not trust Mara yet, but she is willing to test her.
